findings.title: CAB alignment
findings.detail: Production releases require dual approval in Azure DevOps environments mapped to the enterprise change-advisory board records.

findings.title: Evidence packs
findings.detail: Architecture decisions bundle threat models, data-flow diagrams, and control mappings for internal audit sampling.

findings.title: Segregation
findings.detail: Operator roles and developer roles use separate Entra ID groups with PIM for emergency break-glass.

findings.title: Manual approvals
findings.detail: Some service connections still use long-lived tokens despite policy requiring workload identity federation.
